channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Cerebras almost doubles in Nasdaq debut, topping $100 billion market cap after blockbuster IPO
item.description: Cerebras is taking advantage of a bull market for silicon, as the chipmaker becomes one of the most notable pureplay AI IPOs to date.

item.title: Xi warns Trump: Mishandling Taiwan will put U.S.-China relationship in 'great jeopardy'
item.description: President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.

item.title: China will order 200 Boeing jets, Trump tells Fox News
item.description: President Donald Trump told Fox News that China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, according to a clip that aired Thursday.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Ford, Cisco Systems, Applied Materials, StubHub, Coinbase & more
item.description: Here are some of the companies making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Crypto industry scores win as Clarity Act regulation bill clears Senate hurdle
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee advanced a rules-of-the-road crypto bill known as the Clarity Act by a vote of 15-9.

item.title: This generator stock essential to AI is set up well for the near and long term, charts show
item.description: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets breaks down the technicals on this generator stock.

item.title: China will work behind the scenes to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, Bessent says
item.description: President Trump held talks with President Xi during a two-day summit in Beijing on Thursday.

item.title: Trump-Xi summit could hinge on these two crucial tech flashpoints
item.description: Access to the world's second largest economy for U.S. tech companies and talks on critical minerals could be key points of discussion.

item.title: Musk's China trip during OpenAI trial prompts apology from his lawyer for CEO's absence
item.description: Musk sued his OpenAI co-founders Sam Altman and Greg Brockman, alleging they had violated a promise to keep their company a nonprofit.

item.title: Cisco CEO says tech is entering a 'networking supercycle' as stock pops 15% on strong AI demand
item.description: Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades after Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year

item.title: Bessent sees 'substantial disinflation' ahead as Warsh takes over the Fed
item.description: Bessent said the energy-fed inflation surge recently is likely to reverse as the U.S. is "going to keep pumping."

item.title: Wealthy donors stand to win double tax benefit if Trump Accounts allow stock donations
item.description: Permitting stock contributions to Trump Accounts would allow donors to offload appreciated shares without paying capital gains tax.

item.title: Americans still feel pessimistic about the economy. When will it get better?
item.description: U.S. consumer sentiment has been on a downward trend since the Covid pandemic. Inflation, wars and Trump's tariffs are to blame, economists say.

item.title: Why the AI bull market's obsession shifted away from Nvidia to memory chip makers
item.description: Behind the surge is an evolving systems architecture for AI known as "orchestration" in which workloads are distributed through multiple processing channels.

item.title: Biogen advances Alzheimer's drug to late-stage trial despite disappointing data
item.description: Biogen said signals sugget the treatment decreases levels of tau and slows cognitive decline, particularly at the lowest dose.

item.title: Xi tells Musk, Tim Cook and other CEOs on Trump's trip: China will 'open wider'
item.description: Tesla and Space X boss Elon Musk, Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang and Apple CEO Tim Cook were part of Trump's delegation.

item.title: Josh Brown calls a breakout in this insurance stock that has been going sideways for a year
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo take a look at this insurance name on their best stocks list.

item.title: U.S. can hold AI talks with China because ‘we are in the lead,’ Bessent tells CNBC as nations plan safety protocol
item.description: The U.S. Treasury secretary also said President Donald Trump would likely comment on the Taiwan issue in coming days.

item.title: Versant stock jumps after company's Q1 report shows bright spots in licensing, platforms
item.description: Versant, the portfolio of TV networks spun out from Comcast, reported earnings for its first quarter as an independent company.

item.title: Cuba says oil and diesel supplies have run dry under U.S. sanctions
item.description: A Cuban official said the situation is “extremely tense” as blackouts sparked protests in Havana on Wednesday.

item.title: Jim Cramer wants to buy this stock now 10% below its highs. Here's why
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: Living paycheck to paycheck? These budgeting apps can help you stay ahead of your spending
item.description: Budgeting apps provide good insight into your spending habits and where you could free up some cash.

item.title: Venezuela embarks on $150 billion restructuring of debt amid political turmoil
item.description: Venezuelan officials said they wanted to “free the country from the burden of accumulated debt.”

item.title: U.S., EU lawmakers pledge European scrutiny of Paramount's WBD deal
item.description: The lawmakers, in a letter reported first by CNBC, told Paramount CEO David Ellison that the Warner Brothers Discovery acquisition would stifle competition.

item.title: Chinese companies are ramping up homegrown AI chips, even if Nvidia is coming back
item.description: Chinese tech companies have turned to domestic chips as Nvidia has remained shut out of the market.

item.title: Student loan forgiveness paths have changed under Trump. How to navigate them
item.description: Changes to the U.S. Department of Education's income-driven repayment plans will impact many student loan borrowers' timelines to debt cancellation.

item.title: Polestar CEO tells CNBC ‘pump anxiety’ has made EVs ‘all about money’
item.description: The EV maker is seeing an increased demand for both used and new cars as fuel prices have gone up following the disruption at the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak isn't another Covid pandemic – but experts say it's testing U.S. readiness
item.description: For some experts, the outbreak is raising broader concerns about how equipped the U.S. is to respond to future infectious disease threats.

item.title: Senators introduce ban on lawmakers becoming lobbyists
item.description: New bipartisan legislation, first seen by CNBC, would prevent U.S. lawmakers from lobbying after they leave office.

item.title: 65% of workers have avoided using AI for moral, environmental, privacy or other reasons: CNBC survey
item.description: Workers and students in the U.S. say they're skeptical of AI due to moral, privacy or accuracy concerns, the CNBC and SurveyMonkey Quarterly AI and Jobs Survey finds.
